description: Converts a JSON object to XML format. Useful for Claude prompts which work well with XML structure.

inputs.name: json
inputs.description: The JSON object to convert to XML

inputs.name: root_element
inputs.description: Name of the root XML element

inputs.name: pretty
inputs.description: Whether to format with indentation and newlines

inputs.name: indent
inputs.description: Number of spaces for indentation (when pretty is true)
